headline: Government pressure on Anthropic escalates as developer tooling and on-device inference push fresh agentic releases.
body: The White House is intensifying its opposition to Anthropic, which simultaneously faces a lawsuit alleging false advertising over Claude Max subscription limits. Developer tooling leads the rotation, with Tencent WorkBuddy launching a multi-agent desktop productivity system spanning 100-plus domain experts and integrations, and a native Claude Code extension for Visual Studio adding diff-based accept/reject workflows. On-device and local inference surface through Google's Coral Board running Gemma at the edge, while Microsoft turns to AWS to relieve a GitHub AI capacity crunch. Frontier ecosystem framing also advances via a Satya Nadella essay on building frontier ecosystems and a DeepMind paper on the path from AGI to recursive self-improvement.

cited_items.title: Tencent Workbuddy: RIP Claude,Codex! This is ACTUALLY quite a bit CRAZY!
Microsoft turns to AWS as GitHub faces AI capacity crunch
Anthropic Sued over Alleged False Advertising on Claude Max Subscription Limits
